curation.synopsis: Once an Oblivion Knight of the Silent Sisterhood, Amendera Kendel now wears no rank that the Imperium openly names — she works for Malcador the Sigillite, and she works alone. A trail of betrayed loyalties has led her to the Jovian shipyards above the orbits of Sol, where someone is reshaping a battle-fleet meant for the Warmaster. Disguised as nobility at a glittering function, Kendel moves through aristocrats and minor naval lords, hunting for the right throat to crush, while Helig Gallor — the loyal Death Guard who took the grey of the Knights-Errant — watches her back from the shadows. The deeper she digs, the more certain she becomes that the hand behind the conspiracy belongs to a Legion that does not announce itself, and that the dance she is in is the kind that ends only with a knife.
